docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED APR-21-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HODGES, DENNIS KIRK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-08-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. VISITING JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SHI CHENG FANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DENNIS KIRK HODGES IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-08-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SHI CHENG FANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DENNIS KIRK HODGES IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FANG, SHI CHENG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HODGES, DENNIS KIRK $8,675.65 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,750.65, A) REFUND ALL MONIES PAID BY PLAINTIFF ($8675.65). B) RETURN PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE TO HIM FORTHWITH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF FANG, SHI CHENG AS TO DEFENDANT HODGES, DENNIS KIRK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY FANG, SHI CHENG AS TO DEFENDANT HODGES, DENNIS KIRK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
